text.config.zulip-bridge.option.zulipBas:
Full URL of your Zulip organisation.
Example: https://myorg.zulipchat.com
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.botEmail: Email address of the Zulip bot account used for the bridge.
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.botApiKe:
API key for the bot account.
Generate one at Settings → Your account → API key.
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.streamNa: Name of the Zulip stream (channel) to bridge.
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.topicNam: Topic within the stream to bridge.
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.pollInte:
How often to check Zulip for new messages.
Lower values are more responsive but use more API calls.
Enable or disable the bridge. Changes take effect on next world join.
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.playerDi: Name shown in Zulip when you chat. Leave blank to use your in-game name.
text.config.zulip-bridge.option.incoming: Text prepended to Zulip messages shown in Minecraft chat.
